input.title: Chroma vs Qdrant Decision
input.problem_summary: A support copilot needs to decide whether to stay on Chroma or move to Qdrant as filtering needs grow.
assumptions: Current workload is small but filter usage is increasing
The team has retrieval eval slices
risks: Switching storage before measuring filter misses could hide a ranking problem

rationale: 这是选型比较，应先用 workload 和 filtering 需求约束决策。
